headline: Will Rovi’s Digital Batch Execution Win Reshape Rockwell Automation’s (ROK) Software-Led Narrative?
summary: In March 2026, Rockwell Automation announced that Laboratorios Farmacéuticos Rovi and partner Adasoft had completed the first phase of a fully digital batch execution system, replacing paper records and integrating Rockwell’s FactoryTalk PharmaSuite MES with Rovi’s ERP and LIMS platforms to improve traceability and review times. This project, alongside other recent client wins, highlights Rockwell’s growing role in complex, regulated digitalization programs, potentially reinforcing the...

headline: Rockwell Automation (ROK) Collaborates with Laboratorios Farmacéuticos Rovi for Digital Transformation
summary: Rockwell Automation Inc. (NYSE:ROK) is one of the best AI stocks to invest in according to billionaires. On March 12, Rockwell Automation and Laboratorios Farmacéuticos Rovi announced the successful implementation of a comprehensive digital batch execution system at Rovi’s pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities. In collaboration with specialized integrator Adasoft, the project transitioned Rovi from paper-based records […]
